title: epipactis lanceolata
intro: Epipactis lanceolata, also known as Helleborine, is a type of orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Epipactis lanceolata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Epipactis lanceolata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
